headline: How The Marathon Petroleum (MPC) Narrative Is Shifting With New Price Targets And Assumptions
summary: Marathon Petroleum’s updated fair value price target in the model now sits at US$236.61, up from US$216.17. This move of about 9% puts fresh focus on where analysts think the stock could go next. Recent Street research, with many targets pushing higher and a smaller group trimming forecasts, helps explain this new level as a response to shifting views on earnings power and risks. As you read on, you will see how to track these changing targets and what they might mean for your own research...
